  • Uses of BaseGUI in dev.agam.skyblockitems.enchantsystem.gui

    Classes in dev.agam.skyblockitems.enchantsystem.gui that implement BaseGUI

    Class
    Description
    class 
    ConflictSelectionGUI
    GUI for selecting conflicting enchantments.
    class 
    CustomAnvilGUI
    Hypixel SkyBlock-style Anvil GUI based on user's diagram.
    class 
    EnchantEditorGUI
    GUI for editing a custom enchantment.
    class 
    EnchantingGUI
    The main enchanting GUI - based on the old plugin's GUI but improved and recoded.
    class 
    EnchantListGUI
    GUI for listing all custom enchantments.
    class 
    EnchantmentGuideGUI
    A comprehensive guide for all enchantments in the plugin.
    class 
    LevelSelectionGUI
    Sub-menu for selecting enchantment level.
    class 
    StatEditorGUI
    GUI for editing enchantment stats.
    class 
    TargetSelectorGUI
    GUI for selecting target item types.
    class 
    XPCostEditorGUI
    GUI for editing XP costs per level.

  • Uses of BaseGUI in dev.agam.skyblockitems.reforge.gui

    Classes in dev.agam.skyblockitems.reforge.gui that implement BaseGUI
    Modifier and Type
    Class
    Description
    class 
    ReforgeAbilitySelectorGUI
    DEPRECATED - This GUI is no longer used and is kept as a stub to avoid compilation errors if any other (non-reforge) logic still references the class name.
    class 
    ReforgeEditorGUI
    GUI for editing individual reforge properties.
    class 
    ReforgeEnchantSelectorGUI
    GUI for selecting vanilla and custom enchantments for a reforge.
    class 
    ReforgeGemEditorGUI
    GUI for editing individual Gem properties.
    class 
    ReforgeGUI
    GUI for the reforge system.
    class 
    ReforgeItemTypeSelectorGUI
    GUI for selecting item types for reforges (based on TargetSelectorGUI pattern).
    class 
    ReforgeListGUI
    GUI for listing all custom reforges with create/edit/delete capabilities.
    class 
    ReforgeStatEditorGUI
    GUI for editing individual stats of a reforge.
    class 
    ReforgeStatSelectorGUI
    GUI for selecting MMOItems stats to add to a reforge.
    class 
    ReforgeVIPGUI
    VIP Reforge GUI with two input slots (Item + Gem).

    Constructor
    Description
